campaign.title: Real weeks, adaptive rhythm
campaign.strategy_summary: Real weeks, adaptive rhythm: build habits that bend without breaking while preserving measurable acquisition learning, funnel separation, and pillar validation without promising outcomes.

posts.audience_and_problem: People who want better habits but feel failed by rigid streaks, perfect-day planners, and systems that collapse during stressful or inconsistent weeks.
posts.hook: If your streak breaks, you are not the problem.
posts.caption: Real weeks change. Energy, time, and focus move around. Innerbloom is built around a more sustainable idea: keep direction visible without turning every interruption into a reset.

cta.label: Start with a rhythm that fits your life

posts.hypothesis: Pain/friction posts will produce a higher landing CTA rate than product mechanism posts because the audience problem is easier to recognize than the product solution.

secondary_metrics: auth_started by campaign where attribution is available
